nasb.text: and said, “This man stated, ‘I am able to destroy the temple of God and to rebuild it in three days.’ ”

esv.text: and said, “This man said, ‘I am able to destroy the temple of God, and to rebuild it in three days.’”

cnv.text: “這人說過：‘我可以拆毀　神的聖所，三日之內又把它建造起來。’”

ccb.text: “这个人曾经说过，‘我能拆毁圣殿，三天内把它重建起来。’”

csbs.text: 说：“这个人说过：‘我能拆毁神的圣所，三天内又建起来。’”
